// Brief pause simulation (no actual wait node needed for local)
return $input.all();

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Analyze these BUPA sync errors and propose fixes:\n\n' + JSON.stringify($json.errors) }] }) }}

parameters.content:
## M1 - Population Identification
Read active employees and vendor links, merge and deduplicate.

## M2 - Sync Execution
Execute BUPA sync, wait for completion, verify job status.

## M3 - Error Consolidation
Read sync and SLG1 logs, normalize, deduplicate errors.

## M4 - Agent Analysis
Invoke BUPA Sync Agent to analyze errors and propose fixes.
Categorize proposals by confidence score.

## M5 - Report & Completion
Generate reconciliation report with coverage metrics and output final results.
